# MercadoLibre Chile Apify Scrapers

Primary actor for production jobs:
- Actor ID: jchame/atomic-actor-1
- Page: https://apify.com/jchame/atomic-actor-1
- Use for: production MercadoLibre Chile scraping, many queries, category missions, local-only saturation, retries, mission dedupe, parallel child workers, residential/custom proxies, and larger VIP detail batches.

Simple/core actor:
- Actor ID: jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scraper
- Page: https://apify.com/jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scraper
- Use for: simple Chile checks, parser diagnostics, local-only search pages, and small VIP item-detail evidence batches.

Important input:
- searchFilterMode = "envio_local" requests MercadoLibre's local-shipping-only filter page.

Important semantics:
- local_stock_status can be local, import_only, or unknown.
- import_only should not count as local Chile competition.
- unknown or failed visibility is not proof of no local competition.
- These actors are specialized for Chile and mercadolibre.cl, and are not affiliated with MercadoLibre.

Full guide:
- https://github.com/jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/blob/main/llms-full.txt

Public docs:
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/guides/mercadolibre-chile-local-stock-scraper.html
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/guides/scraper-mercadolibre-chile-envio-local.html
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/guides/mercadolibre-chile-local-vs-imported-saturation.html
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/guides/mercadolibre-chile-vip-detail-evidence.html
- https://jchame.github.io/mercadolibre-chile-scrapers/sitemap.xml

Validated task names:
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-local-stock-listings: https://apify.com/jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scraper/examples/mercadolibre-chile-local-stock-listings
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-item-detail-evidence: https://apify.com/jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scraper/examples/mercadolibre-chile-item-detail-evidence
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-parser-diagnostic: https://apify.com/jchame/mercadolibre-chile-scraper/examples/mercadolibre-chile-parser-diagnostic
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-market-saturation
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-local-stock-at-scale
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-vip-detail-batch
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-category-mission
- jchame/mercadolibre-chile-local-vs-imported
